query: Audit this Dockerfile, Kubernetes Deployment, and registry setup against the Singapore Government Container Security controls CS-1 through CS-11. Produce pass/fail findings and concrete fixes.

Containerise our agency Node service for EKS in GCC. Give us a digest-pinned minimal image, non-root runtime, safe secret injection, read-only filesystem, private registry, scanning, segmentation, and runtime protection.
Our VAPT says the pod is privileged, mounts hostPath, runs as root, and pulls node:latest from Docker Hub. Remediate it with ICT&SS CS control traceability.

Review an ECS Fargate task definition for a Singapore agency workload. Check image provenance, private registry use, runtime secrets, vulnerability scans, non-root execution, and runtime detection under the container catalog.
Set up a secure container build pipeline with Hadolint, Trivy, digest pinning, a minimal multi-stage runtime image, and blocking scan gates based on the SSP's CS-7 parameter.
The EKS API is public to 0.0.0.0/0 and every workload is in default with no NetworkPolicy. Explain the applicable government container controls and supply corrected manifests.
We accidentally committed DB_PASSWORD as Docker ENV and copied .npmrc into an image layer. Give an incident-aware remediation that rotates the secrets and redesigns build-time and runtime injection.
Prepare container-security evidence for an SSP review: base-image selection, scanning location, private registry, orchestrator API exposure, workload isolation, and live runtime protection.
Harden our OpenShift deployment for a government project while preserving arbitrary-UID compatibility and mapping every recommendation to CS-1..CS-11.
Explain why Falco or GuardDuty runtime monitoring replaces host AV and EDR inside containers, and how to configure the rest of the CS-11 response workflow.
Configure EC2 host patching, CIS benchmarks, SSM Session Manager, anti-malware, EDR, NTP, DNSSEC, and end-of-support inventory.
Add cosign artifact signing, SLSA provenance, and a deploy-time signature verification gate to GitHub Actions under SC-7 and SC-8.
Design VPC subnets, PrivateLink endpoints, WAF, DDoS protection, hybrid connectivity, and IDS for an agency system.
Scan our Kubernetes cluster as part of an independent VAPT and create a vulnerability register with remediation deadlines.
Write an ordinary Dockerfile for my personal static website. I just want a small nginx image and there is no government or regulated context.
Build secure Express authentication endpoints with parameterised SQL, Argon2, rate limiting, safe errors, and server-side sessions.
Set up immutable backups, recovery tests, RTO/RPO, a disaster recovery plan, and business continuity exercises.
Audit IAM users, privileged MFA, dormant contractors, access reviews, government SSO, and managed admin endpoints.
We need central GCSOC log forwarding, VPC Flow Logs, CloudTrail, database audit logs, retention, sanitisation, and automated detections.
Determine whether our sandbox should use the Sandbox, Low-Risk Cloud, or Medium-Risk Cloud SSP and emit the control levels.
